title: Etsy Q1 2026 Earnings: GMS Growth, Agentic AI Tests & Depop Sale Delay
text: Etsy Q1 2026 earnings demonstrated a turnaround in key metrics with GMS growth accelerating and agentic AI initiatives gaining traction. Marketplace GMS grew 5.5% year-over-year, marking the second consecutive quarter of growth. The company beat revenue expectations with $631.3 million in revenue and adjusted EPS of $0.89 versus expectations of $0.62. Active buyers resumed sequential growth for the first time in two years, with improved engagement metrics across the platform. GMS per active buyer improved for the fourth consecutive quarter, reaching $122 on a trailing twelve-month basis. Mobile continued to be a strong growth driver, with app GMS up 11.2% year-over-year and accounting for 47% of total GMS. Early tests with agentic commerce generated fifteen-fold year-over-year increases in traffic from AI-powered shopping assistants like ChatGPT, Google, and Microsoft Copilot. The Depop sale to eBay for $1.2 billion was pushed back from Q2 to the end of Q3 2026, with Depop generating $1.1 billion in GMS in 2025. Management reaffirmed full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA margin guidance of 28% to 30%.
